strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js work at recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE)
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of test libraries, and creator of testing workshops/courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned; frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js with only one recent React mention
No Kotlin experience and Java exposure appears dated and secondary
Significant career time invested in DLang, a niche stack with limited direct relevance to the primary stack
response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years requirement with sustained senior/staff-level fullstack work in TypeScript and Node.js, plus MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure. The recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly matches a required skill that is rare among applicants, and the strong testing and craftsmanship background fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps in Nest.js, React depth, and Kotlin are real but learnable for an engineer with this breadth across languages and platforms.
